architectural_notes: In global/globe mode, text inside the globe component should be hidden to avoid conflict with the top bar

existing_features.title: Remove the random/unintended image that appears in full screen mode (inside FullscreenOverlay or related fullscreen components). It should not be rendered at all.
In global/globe mode, hide the text content rendered inside the GlobeView component to prevent it from conflicting with the top bar (AppHeader).

projectName: Remove random fullscreen image and hide globe text in global mode
